blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this learning path. You now have a repeatable way to capture baselines, enforce them with thresholds, and archive runs in Grafana Cloud k6.

**What you accomplished**

- Learned how p95 or p99 latency, throughput, and error rate combine into a baseline story
- Authored `baseline.js` with ramping virtual users and steady-state measurement
- Added checks for functional validation alongside performance metrics
- Interpreted k6 summary output and translated numbers into thresholds
- Validated pass and fail exit codes for automation
- Streamed results to Grafana Cloud for historical comparison

**Where to go next**

- Explore [Synthetic Monitoring](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/testing/synthetic-monitoring/) for continuous production checks
- Continue reliability practice with the [Create an availability SLO](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/create-availability-slo/) path
- Revisit [Run your first k6 performance test](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/run-first-k6-test/) if teammates still need foundational setup
